Home Experiences Blogs

Experiences

Machine Learning Engineer, Meta (June 2024 - April 2026)
Worked in Instagram Stories Ranking team to rank IG Stories and Musics, with a focus on late-stage ranking and modeling.
Quantitative Researcher Intern, IMC Trading (Summer 2023)
Researched and implemented algorithms for improving high-frequency pricing valuations for US Treasury Bonds.
Software Engineering Intern, Google (Summer 2022)
Worked with Kubeflow Pipelines group to support authoring machine learning pipelines.
Undergraduate Research Intern, Stanford SNAP Group (Summer 2021)
I worked under the CURIS program at Stanford SNAP Group under the mentorship of Giray Ogut, Hongyu Ren, Tailin Wu, and Professor Jure Leskovec.
Software Engineering Internship, DeepWisdom (Winter 2021)
I worked in DeepWisdom, a Auto Machine Learning-driven startup company in Shenzhen, China.
Ross Mathematics Program (Summer 2020)
I worked as a program counselor for Ross Program in 2020 and as a teaching assistant for the Analytic Number Theory course, holding weekly problem solving seminars.
